name: Tembo Global Industries Limited
summary: Tembo Global Industries Limited manufactures and fabricates various steel products in India and internationally. It offers various products, such as pipe hangers; anti-vibration systems; floor drains; fasteners; dielectric fittings; cable trays; conduits; earthing accessories; and ERW pipes. The company also trades in textile products. It markets its products through dealers under the Tembo Seven Star and Etalia brands. The company's products have applications in pipe hangers, support systems, HVAC systems, anti-vibration systems and equipment for construction, industrial, commercial, utility, and OEM Installations. The company was formerly known as Saketh Exim Limited. Tembo Global Industries Limited was founded in 2010 and is based in Navi Mumbai, India.
